transfer_hdr.complete_flag <> 'Y')
		INNER JOIN location to_loc (NOLOCK) ON (to_loc.location_id = transfer_hdr.to_location_id)
		INNER JOIN transfer_line (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										 AND (transfer_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
										 AND ((( transfer_line.row_status <> 1 )
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id))
										  OR  ((transfer_line.row_status = 0)
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id <> to_loc.company_id)))
										 AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
										 AND (COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') = 'Y')

		LEFT JOIN (SELECT	transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
							,SUM(CASE	WHEN transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received <= transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
												AND transfer_shipment_line.row_status_flag = 974 THEN
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received
										ELSE
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
								 END) AS transfer_shipment_quantity
				   FROM	transfer_shipment_line (NOLOCK)
				   INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid)
				   GROUP BY transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
				) AS drv_transfer_shipment ON (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										  AND (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_line_no = transfer_line.line_no)
		GROUP BY inv_loc.company_id
				,to_loc.company_id
				,inv_loc.location_id
				,inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
				,inv_mast.item_id

	RETURN
END

--$Author: Bernie.pomidor $
--$Revision: 4 $
--$Date: 7/22/11 10:50a $
--$Log: /Server/CommerceCenter/Wholesale (12.7)/Functions/p21_fnt_oe_xfer_reserve_qty.sql $
-- 
-- 4     7/22/11 10:50a Bernie.pomidor
-- DBA: BGP
-- DEV: USA
-- sum qty in transfer reserve group
-- b012_006_032638
-- 
-- 1     6/23/09 3:33p Bernie.pomidor
-- DBA: BGP
-- DEV: RSM
-- new function
-- aoa027453
--

.complete_flag <> 'Y')
		INNER JOIN location to_loc  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (to_loc.location_id = transfer_hdr.to_location_id)
		INNER JOIN transfer_line  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										 AND (transfer_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
										 AND ((( transfer_line.row_status <> 1 )
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id))
										  OR  ((transfer_line.row_status = 0)
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id <> to_loc.company_id)))
										 AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
										 AND (COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') = 'Y')

		LEFT JOIN (SELECT	transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
							,SUM(CASE	WHEN transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received <= transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
												AND transfer_shipment_line.row_status_flag = 974 THEN
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received
										ELSE
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
								 END) AS transfer_shipment_quantity
				   FROM	transfer_shipment_line  WITH (NOLOCK)
				   INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid)
				   GROUP BY transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
				) AS drv_transfer_shipment ON (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										  AND (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_line_no = transfer_line.line_no)
		GROUP BY inv_loc.company_id
				,to_loc.company_id
				,inv_loc.location_id
				,inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
				,inv_mast.item_id
				,to_loc.location_id

	RETURN
END


--$Author: Claudia.gonzalez $

--$Log: /Server/CommerceCenter/Z_Polecat (20.2)/Functions/p21_fnt_oe_xfer_reserve_qty_by_to_loc.sql $
-- 
-- 1     5/03/21 1:49p Claudia.gonzalez
-- DEV: BP
-- DBA: CEG
-- Scopus #1424506:Create new function (similar to
-- p21_fnt_oe_xfer_reserve_qty) but will include the destination location
-- that has inventory reserved on transfers.
-- b020_002_056116.sql

ast.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid ) AND  
										(location.location_id = inv_loc.location_id )  
				LEFT JOIN (		SELECT		oe_line_po.order_number,     
											oe_line_po.line_number,   
											SUM(oe_line_po.quantity_on_po) qty_transferred   
								FROM		oe_line_po    
								INNER JOIN	transfer_hdr on transfer_hdr.transfer_no = oe_line_po.po_no  
								WHERE		oe_line_po.delete_flag = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.completed = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.cancel_flag = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.connection_type = 'T'  
										AND COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'  
								GROUP BY	oe_line_po.order_number,   
											oe_line_po.line_number  
						)		AS			v_oe_line_po ON (v_oe_line_po.order_number = oe_line.order_no)  
														AND (v_oe_line_po.line_number = oe_line.line_no)  
				LEFT JOIN	system_setting ss ON (ss.name = 'incl_stk_bo_on_chold_in_rqmt')   
											AND (ss.configuration_id = 0)  
    
       
				WHERE		oe_line.disposition = 'T'  
					  AND	oe_line.delete_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_line.complete = 'N'   
					  AND	oe_line.source_loc_id = @al_SourceLocationID   
					  AND	oe_line.cancel_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.delete_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.completed = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.cancel_flag = 'N'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.approved = 'Y'  
					  AND	oe_hdr.projected_order = 'N'  
					  AND	( NULL IS NULL OR oe_line.ship_loc_id = NULL )  
					  AND	( ( oe_hdr.validation_status <> 'Hold' ) OR ( ( inv_loc.stockable = 'Y' ) AND ( COALESCE(ss.value,'N') = 'Y' ) ) )  
					  AND	( oe_line.qty_ordered - oe_line.qty_allocated - oe_line.qty_on_pick_tickets - oe_line.qty_invoiced - oe_line.qty_canceled - oe_line.qty_staged) - COALESCE(v_oe_line_po.qty_transferred, 0) > 0  
					  AND	( @al_InvMastUid IS NULL or inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = @al_InvMastUid)  
  
				---------  
				UNION ALL  
				---------  
  
				SELECT		inv_mast.inv_mast_uid,  
							prod_order_hdr.source_location_id location_id,    
							prod_order_line_component.source_location_id source_loc_id,      
							(	prod_order_line_component.qty_requested 
								- prod_order_line_component.qty_allocated 
								- prod_order_line_component.qty_used 
								- prod_order_line_component.qty_canceled 
								- prod_order_line_component.qty_on_pick_tickets 
								- prod_order_line_component.qty_confirmed
							) 	- COALESCE(v_oe_line_po.qty_transferred, 0) obt_qty_needed,  
							0 tbo_qty_needed  
				FROM		prod_order_line_component  
				INNER JOIN  prod_order_hdr ON prod_order_hdr.prod_order_number = prod_order_line_component.prod_order_number  
				INNER JOIN  location ON location.location_id = prod_order_hdr.source_location_id  
				INNER JOIN  inv_mast ON inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = prod_order_line_component.inv_mast_uid   
				LEFT JOIN  
							(	SELECT		oe_line_po.order_number,    
											oe_line_po.line_number,     
											SUM(o

id,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_sub_line_no,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_parent_tag,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_parent_tag_pkg_type,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_top_parent_tag_no,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_top_parent_pkg_type,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_rf_sku_qty_picked,   
		tag_document_line.inv_mast_uid,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_sequence_no,   
		tag_document_line.qty_action_type_cd,   
		tag_document_line.source_tdl_uid,   
		tag_document_line.tdl_tagging_method_cd,
		vessel_receipts_hdr.location_id,
		'' assemble_disassemble
FROM	tag_document_line WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN container_receipts_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON (container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid = tag_document_line.tdl_document_no)
INNER JOIN container_receipts_line WITH (NOLOCK) ON (container_receipts_line.container_receipts_hdr_uid = container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid)
INNER JOIN vessel_receipts_line WITH (NOLOCK) ON (vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_line_uid = container_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_line_uid)
											 AND (vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_container_uid = container_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipts_container_uid)
											 AND (vessel_receipts_line.line_no = tag_document_line.tdl_document_line_no)
INNER JOIN vessel_receipts_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON (vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid = vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid)
WHERE	tag_document_line.tdl_document_type_cd = 1984 -- Container Receipts
  AND	container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 971 -- Unapproved
  AND	tag_document_line.tdl_tag_detail_uid = @ai_TagDetailUID
)

CREATE PROCEDURE p21_po_links_for_order_3793
 @as_OrderNumber VARCHAR(20)  
 , @al_LocationId DECIMAL(19, 0)  
 , @as_ItemId VARCHAR(40)  
 , @al_OrderLineNo DECIMAL(19, 0)  
 , @al_OrderLineUid INT  
 , @al_XferLocationId DECIMAL(19, 0)  
AS  
  
	SELECT CAST ( @as_OrderNumber AS char(20) ) order_no,  
	   inv_mast.item_id,  
	   po_hdr.order_date,  
	   inv_mast.item_desc,  
	   supplier.supplier_name customer_name,  
	   po_line.qty_ordered,  
	   po_line.date_due + COALESCE(transfer_days.days, 0) required_date,  
	   0.000000000 qty_allocated,  
	   0.000000000 qty_on_pick_tickets,  
	   po_line.qty_received qty_invoiced,  
	   inv_loc.order_quantity order_quantity,  
	   item_uom.unit_size,  
	   @al_OrderLineNo line_no,  
	   0.000000000 qty_canceled,  
	   0.000000000 qty_staged,  
	   0 component_number,  
	   0.000000000 c_ReleaseScheduleQty,  
	   'N' c_OpenReleaseSchedule,  
	   COALESCE(drv_PoThisOrderLinked.c_qty_on_po, 0) linked_qty,  
	   -- 12.5 USA 9/16/10 Scopus# 915177: Include qty on vessel to calculate qty on other PO.  
	   COALESCE(drv_PoOtherOrderLinked.c_qty_on_po, 0) + COALESCE(drv_PoProdOrderLinked.c_qty_on_po, 0) + COALESCE(drv_qtyonvessel.c_qty_on_vessel, 0) c_qty_on_other_po,  
	   @al_OrderLineUid oe_line_uid,  
	   COALESCE(po_line.desired_receipt_location_id, po_hdr.location_id) source_loc_id,  
	   'PO' c_OrderType,  
	   inv_loc.location_id,  
	   po_line.po_no,  
	   po_line.line_no,  
	   po_line.po_line_uid,  
	   inv_mast.inv_mast_uid,  
	   po_line.unit_price / po_line.pricing_unit_size sku_cost,  
	   COALESCE(drv_PoThisOrderLinked.c_qty_on_po, 0) original_linked_qty,  
	   CAST ( @al_LocationId AS decimal(19,0) ) c_locationid,  
	   NULL,   
	   NULL,   
	   NULL,   
	   NULL,   
	   NULL,   
	   NULL    
	   ,NULL  
	  
	-- Nob USA 06/10/08 Feature 28159: Add columns revision_level, use_revisions_flag.  
	   ,COALESCE(item_revision.revision_level, '') revision_level  
	   ,COALESCE(inv_mast.use_revisions_flag, 'N')  use_revisions_flag  
	  
	FROM inv_loc  
	INNER JOIN inv_mast ON ( inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid )  
	INNER JOIN po_line ON ( inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = po_line.inv_mast_uid )  AND ( inv_loc.location_id = po_line.desired_receipt_location_id)
	INNER JOIN po_hdr ON ( po_line.po_no = po_hdr.po_no )
	-- Nob USA 06/10/08 Feature 28159: Add join to revision_transaction.  
	LEFT JOIN revision_transaction ON revision_transaction.transaction_no = po_line.po_no  
			  AND revision_transaction.transaction_line_no = po_line.line_no  
			  AND  revision_transaction.transaction_code_no = 916  
	LEFT JOIN item_revision ON item_revision.item_revision_uid = revision_transaction.item_revision_uid   
	  
	  
	INNER JOIN supplier ON ( po_hdr.supplier_id = supplier.supplier_id )  
	INNER JOIN item_uom ON ( inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = item_uom.inv_mast_uid ) AND  
			( inv_mast.default_purchasing_unit = item_uom.unit_of_measure )  
	/*

ocation_id = @al_LocationID
										AND inventory_receipts_hdr.approved = 'N'
									GROUP BY inventory_receipts_line.inv_mast_uid
									) upr ON upr.inv_mast_uid = #SyncDumpResults.inv_mast_uid
                WHERE   #SyncDumpResults.serial_no IS NULL  

	-- Fill in the P21 Unapproved Container Receipts qtys
                UPDATE  #SyncDumpResults
                SET     p21_unapproved_po_rcpt_qty = p21_unapproved_po_rcpt_qty + ucr.total_qty
                FROM    #SyncDumpResults 
                        INNER JOIN (SELECT 
										po_line.inv_mast_uid,
										SUM(container_receipts_line.qty_received) total_qty
									FROM container_receipts_line WITH (NOLOCK)
									INNER JOIN container_receipts_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid = container_receipts_line.container_receipts_hdr_uid
									INNER JOIN vessel_receipts_line WITH (NOLOCK) ON vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_line_uid = container_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_line_uid
									INNER JOIN vessel_receipts_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid = vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid
									INNER JOIN po_line WITH (NOLOCK) ON po_line.po_line_uid = vessel_receipts_line.po_line_uid
									WHERE vessel_receipts_hdr.location_id = @al_LocationID
									AND container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 971 -- unconfirmed
									AND container_receipts_line.qty_received > 0
									GROUP BY po_line.inv_mast_uid
									) ucr ON ucr.inv_mast_uid = #SyncDumpResults.inv_mast_uid
                WHERE   #SyncDumpResults.serial_no IS NULL

	-- Fill in the P21 Unreceived Transfer Qty qtys.
                UPDATE  #SyncDumpResults
                SET     p21_unreceived_transfer_qty = utq.unreceived_qty
                FROM    #SyncDumpResults 
                INNER JOIN (SELECT 
							transfer_line.inv_mast_uid
                          ,SUM(transfer_line.qty_received - transfer_line.qty_transferred) unreceived_qty
                   FROM   transfer_line WITH (NOLOCK)
                          INNER JOIN transfer_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON transfer_hdr.transfer_no = transfer_line.transfer_no
                   WHERE  (transfer_hdr.from_location_id = @al_LocationID)
                      AND (transfer_hdr.delete_flag <> 'Y')
                      AND (transfer_hdr.complete_flag <> 'Y')
                      AND ((transfer_line.qty_received - transfer_line.qty_transferred) < 0)
                      AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
                      AND (transfer_line.row_status <> 1) -- 1 = complete
                   GROUP  BY transfer_line.inv_mast_uid
				  ) utq ON utq.inv_mast_uid = #SyncDumpResults.inv_mast_uid
				WHERE  #SyncDumpResults.serial_no IS NULL

	-- Match RF Navigator serials to P21 serials  
                UPDATE  #SyncDumpResults
                SET     p21_qty_on_hand = 1 ,
                        p21_qty_allocated = CASE WHEN seria

nceCode = '3055'
SET @PeriodList = ''  
SET @PeriodListCoalesce = ''  

/*	Figure out how to get these values when the report is run
IF @ReportRun > 0
	SET @Horizon = 15
*/

SELECT	@PeriodsInYear = number_of_demand_periods  
		,@UseProductionOrderRequiredDates = COALESCE(prod_date_setting.value, 'N')
		,@AllocateToPlannedSchedules = COALESCE(allocate_to_planned_setting.value, 'N')
		,@UseReplenishmentLoc = COALESCE(future_stock_include_replenishment_loc.value, 'N')
		,@UseRollupLoc = COALESCE(future_stock_include_rollup_loc.value, 'N')
		,@AllowContainerReceipts = COALESCE(allow_container_receipts.value, 'N')
FROM	company  WITH (NOLOCK)  
LEFT JOIN system_setting prod_date_setting  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (prod_date_setting.name = 'use_prodreqdate_on_commtsched')
LEFT JOIN system_setting allocate_to_planned_setting  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (allocate_to_planned_setting.name = 'allocate_to_planned_schedules')
LEFT JOIN system_setting future_stock_include_replenishment_loc  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (future_stock_include_replenishment_loc.name = 'future_stock_include_replenishment_loc')
LEFT JOIN system_setting future_stock_include_rollup_loc  WITH (NOLOCK) ON (future_stock_include_rollup_loc.name = 'future_stock_include_rollup_loc')
LEFT JOIN system_setting allow_container_receipts WITH (NOLOCK) ON (allow_container_receipts.name = 'allow_container_receipts')
WHERE	company_id = @CompanyID  

SELECT @CurrentPeriod = dbo.p21_fn_getperiod(@CompanyID, @ld_current_timestamp, 'Demand')  
SELECT @CurrentYear = dbo.p21_fn_getyear(@CompanyID, @ld_current_timestamp, 'Demand')  
SELECT @CurrentPeriodYear = dbo.p21_fnt_CalcComputedYearPeriod(@CurrentYear, @CurrentPeriod, @PeriodsInYear, 0)  


SELECT @count_period=count(*)from demand_period
WHERE  computed_year_period>=@CurrentPeriodYear
and company_id = @CompanyID

IF @Periods> @count_period
	SET @Periods= @count_period

--Have to capture one more to populate the last replenishment period
IF (@UseReplenishmentLoc = 'Y')
	SET @Periods = @Periods + 1

CREATE TABLE #temp_periods

,period						INTEGER NULL  
,year_for_period			INTEGER NULL  
,computed_year_period		INTEGER NULL  
,prior_computed_year_period	INTEGER NULL
,begin_date					DATETIME NULL  
,end_date					DATETIME NULL)

	SELECT	'

,computed_year_period		INTEGER NULL
,prior_computed_year_period	INTEGER NULL
,begin_date					DATETIME NULL  
,end_date					DATETIME NULL)'

IF (@Debug & 128 > 0)
	SELECT	'
CREATE TABLE #temp_data  
(temp_data_uid	INTEGER IDENTITY
,inv_mast_uid	INTEGER NULL
,location_id

st_modified

		,inventory_receipts_line.last_maintained_by AS inv_rcpts_line_last_maintained_by

		,inventory_receipts_line.unit_cost
		,inventory_receipts_line.extended_cost
		,inventory_receipts_line.freight_amount AS inv_rcpts_line_freight_amount
		,inventory_receipts_line.amount_vouched
		,inventory_receipts_line.freight_amount_vouched
		,inventory_receipts_line.unit_cost_display
		,inventory_receipts_line.extended_cost_display
		,inventory_receipts_line.freight_amount_display AS inv_rcpts_line_freight_amount_display
		,inventory_receipts_line.inv_mast_uid
		,inventory_receipts_line.qty_disassembled
		,inventory_receipts_line.qty_lost
		,inventory_receipts_line.msp_landed_cost
		,inventory_receipts_line.substitute_item
		,inventory_receipts_line.original_inv_mast_uid
		,inventory_receipts_line.pricing_unit
		,inventory_receipts_line.pricing_unit_size
		,inventory_receipts_line.substitute_line_number
		,inventory_receipts_line.date_receipt_removed
		,inventory_receipts_line.retrieved_by_wms
		,inv_mast.item_id
		,inv_bin.bin
FROM inventory_receipts_line(NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN inventory_receipts_hdr(NOLOCK) ON (inventory_receipts_line.receipt_number = inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_number)
INNER JOIN inv_mast(NOLOCK) on inventory_receipts_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
LEFT JOIN transfer_hdr ON (inventory_receipts_hdr.po_number = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
LEFT JOIN inv_bin(NOLOCK) ON ( inventory_receipts_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_bin.inv_mast_uid 
				AND transfer_hdr.to_location_id = inv_bin.location_id)
LEFT JOIN  inv_loc(NOLOCK) ON inv_loc.inv_mast_uid = inventory_receipts_line.inv_mast_uid
				AND inv_loc.track_bins = 'Y'
				AND inv_loc.location_id = transfer_hdr.to_location_id
WHERE inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type = 'T'

--$Author: Nate.gebeau $

po_line.inv_mast_uid)
											AND (serial_number.serial_number = document_line_serial.serial_number)

			UNION

			SELECT	'CONTAINER RECEIPTS' AS tran_type
					,vessel_receipts_hdr.location_id
					,inv_mast.item_id
					,po_line.inv_mast_uid
					,CASE serial_number.row_status
						WHEN 2 THEN 'Y'
						ELSE 'N'
					 END AS allocated
					,p21_view_slab_dimensions.slab_area AS tran_qty_1
					,vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipt_number AS reference_document_no
					,vessel_receipts_line.line_no AS reference_document_line_no
					,'VESSEL RECEIPT' AS reference_type
					,container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid AS document_no
					,vessel_receipts_line.line_no
					,document_line_serial.document_type
					,document_line_serial.serial_number
					,document_line_serial.document_cd
					,document_line_serial.date_created
					,document_line_serial.date_last_modified
					,document_line_serial.last_maintained_by
					,document_line_serial.dimension_tracking_key
					,document_line_serial.document_line_serial_uid
					,document_line_serial.row_status
					,document_line_serial.sub_line_no
					,document_line_serial.sequence_no
					,document_line_serial.serial_number_uid
					,document_line_serial.qty_from_tags
					-- 12.5 JBH 11/17/10 - Feature 45455 - Also try to get lot from serial_number.
					,COALESCE(document_line_serial.lot_uid, serial_number.lot_uid) AS lot_uid
					,NULL AS to_location_id
					,CASE 
						WHEN vessel_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 971 THEN 'N' 
						ELSE 'Y' 
					 END AS approved
					,NULL AS tran_qty_allocated
					,container_receipts_line.qty_received AS tran_quantity
					,'qty_received' AS tran_quantity_desc
					,CASE 
						WHEN container_receipts_line.complete_po_line_flag = 'N' THEN 'PO Not Complete'
						ELSE 'PO Complete'
					 end AS tran_line_status
					,CASE 
						WHEN container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 971 THEN 'Unapproved'
						WHEN container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 972 THEN 'Approved'
						WHEN container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 702 THEN 'Open'
					 END AS tran_hdr_status
					,container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag AS tran_hdr_row_status_flag
					,NULL AS tran_line_row_status_flag
					,container_receipts_line.date_created AS tran_line_date_created
					,container_receipts_line.date_last_modified AS tran_line_date_last_modified
					,container_receipts_line.last_maintained_by AS tran_line_last_maintained_by
					,serial_number.serial_number_uid AS serial_number_serial_number_uid
					,NULL AS adjust_inv_loc
					,NULL AS adjust_lot
					,NULL AS adjust_slab
					,NULL AS adjust_single_lot_cd
					,NULL AS adjust_single_lot_qty
			FROM	container_receipts_hdr (NOLOCK)
			INNER JOIN container_receipts_line (NOLOCK) ON (container_receipts_line.container_receipts_hdr_uid = container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid)
			INNER JOIN vessel_receipts_line (NOLOCK) ON (vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts

eipt_number'
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1674 THEN CAST(vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipt_number AS VARCHAR(255))
			WHEN 1984 THEN CAST(vessel_receipts_container.container_name AS VARCHAR(255))
			ELSE COALESCE(inventory_receipts_hdr.external_reference_no, CAST(inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_number AS VARCHAR(255)))
		END external_reference_no
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1220 THEN inventory_receipts_hdr.po_number
			WHEN 1223 THEN transfer_hdr.transfer_no
			WHEN 1674 THEN vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipt_number
			WHEN 1984 THEN container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid
		END linked_transaction_number
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1674 THEN vessel_receipts_hdr.receipt_date
			WHEN 1984 THEN container_receipts_hdr.date_received
			ELSE inventory_receipts_hdr.date_created
		END receipt_date
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
		WHEN 1674 THEN vessel_receipts_hdr.date_created
			WHEN 1984 THEN container_receipts_hdr.date_created
			ELSE COALESCE(po_hdr.order_date, transfer_hdr.date_created)
		END order_date
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1220 THEN po_hdr.branch_id
			-- 12.12 USA 03/14/13 Scopus 1127531: COALESCE default_branch_id to '0'. When company does not use branch accounting 
			-- location.default_branch_id is NULL and the system should instead use '0' as default_branch_id.
			WHEN 1223 THEN COALESCE(location.default_branch_id, '0') 
			WHEN 1674 THEN COALESCE(location_v.default_branch_id, '0')
			WHEN 1984 THEN COALESCE(location_c.default_branch_id, '0')
		END 'branch_id'
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1220 THEN po_hdr.location_id
			WHEN 1223 THEN location.location_id
			WHEN 1674 THEN vessel_receipts_hdr.location_id
			WHEN 1984 THEN vessel_receipts_hdr_c.location_id
		END location_id
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1674 THEN 'V'
			WHEN 1984 THEN 'C'
			ELSE inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type
		END receipt_type
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1674 THEN CASE vessel_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag WHEN 972 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
			WHEN 1984 THEN CASE container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag WHEN 972 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
			ELSE inventory_receipts_hdr.approved
		END approved
		-- 12.12 CAA 06/10/13 - Scopus# 1105803: Added Vouch Complete.
		,COALESCE(inventory_receipts_hdr.vouch_complete, 'N') 'vouch_complete'

		-- 23.1 CAA 02/02/23 - Jira P21CD-34018: Return the Transaction Type Code.
		,lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd

		-- 23.1 CAA 02/01/23 - Jira P21CD-34018: Return the Period and Year.
		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1220 THEN inventory_receipts_hdr.period
			WHEN 1223 THEN transfer_shipment_hdr.period
			WHEN 1674 THEN vessel_receipts_hdr.period
			WHEN 1984 THEN container_receipts_hdr.period
		END AS period

		,CASE lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd
			WHEN 1220 THEN in

receipts_hdr   ON lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_number = vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipt_number
			       AND lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd = 1674
LEFT JOIN vessel_receipts_line ON vessel_receipts_hdr.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid = vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_hdr_uid
 			      AND lc_driver_x_tran_detail.line_no = vessel_receipts_line.line_no
  		              AND lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd = 1674
LEFT JOIN po_line  ON vessel_receipts_line.po_line_uid = po_line.po_line_uid
LEFT JOIN inv_mast po_mast ON po_line.inv_mast_uid = po_mast.inv_mast_uid
LEFT JOIN (SELECT container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid
		,vessel_receipts_line.line_no line_number
		,po_line.inv_mast_uid
		,container_receipts_line.qty_received
		,vessel_receipts_line.po_sku_cost sku_cost
		,inv_mast.item_id
		,inv_mast.item_desc
	FROM container_receipts_line
	INNER JOIN container_receipts_hdr ON container_receipts_line.container_receipts_hdr_uid = container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid
	INNER JOIN vessel_receipts_line   ON container_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_line_uid = vessel_receipts_line.vessel_receipts_line_uid
	INNER JOIN po_line  ON vessel_receipts_line.po_line_uid = po_line.po_line_uid
	INNER JOIN inv_mast ON po_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid) AS c_receipts_line ON lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_number = c_receipts_line.container_receipts_hdr_uid
 																						   AND lc_driver_x_tran_detail.line_no = c_receipts_line.line_number	
  																						   AND lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd = 1984
	LEFT JOIN container_receipts_hdr ON lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_number = container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid
									AND container_receipts_hdr.row_status_flag = 972
									AND lc_driver_x_tran.transaction_type_cd = 1984
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT MAX(inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_number) 'receipt_number'
					 ,inventory_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid
					 ,COUNT(1) 'count'
				 FROM inventory_receipts_hdr
				 WHERE inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type = 'P'
				   AND inventory_receipts_hdr.delete_flag = 'N'
				   AND inventory_receipts_hdr.approved = 'Y'
				 GROUP BY inventory_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid) AS drv_container_inventory_receipts_hdr ON drv_container_inventory_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid = container_receipts_hdr.container_receipts_hdr_uid
																													AND drv_container_inventory_receipts_hdr.count = 1
WHERE lc_driver_x_tran_detail.transaction_type_cd IN (1220,1223,1674,1984)
